constraints: Do not promote FL17 or FL16 as baseline in this stage.
Represent FL17 export PASS as archive/package validation only.
Represent FL16 status as BLOCKED_NOT_PROMOTED because its receipt explicitly says blocked_before_promotion and promotion_decision NOT_PROMOTED.
Write semantic authority artifacts that make packaging_success and promotion_success disjoint unless promotion receipt/handoff explicitly pass.
Preserve current tracker-working OS active baseline.
derived_checks: FL17 contains_through_stage names FL16 validation stage
No baseline pointer promotion is performed by this stage
semantic_rule: Packaging/export validity can carry blocked evidence; it does not convert a blocked validation/promotion stage into a passed promotion.
